channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Stop Paying for Cloud: Deploy a Highly Available Cluster on Your Own Hardware in Minutes
item.description: A 4-node highly available cluster with distributed storage, software-defined networking, and automatic failover. About 30 minutes to deploy. No Terraform. No Ansible playbooks. No 47-page...

item.title: Your Site Is Up. Your Site Is Broken. Both Are True.
item.description: Every monitoring tool on the market will tell you when your site is down. None of them will tell you when your site returns HTTP 200 OK but serves a broken experience. We built Sitewatch to close...

item.title: When the App Goes Silent: The Hidden Cost of “No Orders”
item.description: Team GigEase | Guidewire DEVTrails 2026 — Scale Phase When the App Goes Silent: The Hidden Cost of “No Orders” Team [Your Team Name] | Guidewire DEVTrails 2026 — Scale Phase Picture this. It’s a...

item.title: I Got Tired of Cold Outreach. So I Made Claude Do It.
item.description: I Built an MCP That Turns Claude Into a Cold Outreach Machine — and It Actually Works Submitted for the Notion MCP Challenge 2026 Let me be honest with you. Cold outreach is broken. Not because...

item.title: Xperience Community: Content Repositories
item.description: If you have been building with Xperience by Kentico, you are probably familiar with the repetitive ceremony around fetching web page content: URL resolution, language detection, caching, null...

item.title: Show HN: Agent Skill Harbor – a GitHub-native skill platform for teams
item.description: There are already many services for discovering public skills, and many ways to manage your own personal skills.What still feels missing is the middle layer: how teams and organizations share AI...

item.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
item.description: Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.

item.title: #holochain Built an experimental Holochain voting hApp for transparent org/community pilots #p2p #holo try it . https://github.com/ta10101/holochain-ballot
item.description: GitHub - ta10101/holochain-ballot: Experimental Holochain voting hApp with transparent tallies for demos and org/community pilots · GitHub Experimental Holochain voting hApp with transparent...

item.title: Cloud Egress Costs Explained: Why Your Architecture Is Paying a Tax You Never Modeled
item.description: You modeled compute. You modeled storage. You built cost estimates, ran capacity planning, and got sign-off on the architecture before a single resource was provisioned. You did not model what it...

item.title: We Built a LlamaIndex Integration. They Closed the PR. The Code Still Works.
item.description: Last week, a maintainer at LlamaIndex closed our pull request. Not because of code quality. Not because of test failures. The reason: "We are pausing contributions that contribute net-new...

item.title: JavaScript Closures Explained Simply
item.description: Let’s be honest. Closures in JavaScript sound scary at first. You’ve probably seen definitions like: “A closure is a function that retains access to its lexical scope…” And your brain immediately...

item.title: Cohere launches an open-source voice model specifically for transcription
item.description: Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages.

item.title: [Webinar] Stop Guessing. Learn to Validate Your Defenses Against Real Attacks
item.description: Most teams have security tools in place. Alerts are firing, dashboards look clean, threat intel is flowing in. On the surface, everything feels under control. But one question usually stays...

item.title: Claude Extension Flaw Enabled Zero-Click XSS Prompt Injection via Any Website
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a vulnerability in Anthropic's Claude Google Chrome Extension that could have been exploited to trigger malicious prompts simply by visiting a web page....

item.title: Some of our favorite Apple tech is cheaper than ever during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: It feels like nearly everything is receiving some sort of discount as part of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale — that is, except for most Apple devices. Don’t worry, though; you’re not completely out of...

item.title: Webtoon is adding AI localization tools to its comics platform
item.description: Canvas, Webtoon's platform for user-uploaded comics, is about to get a major overhaul that's designed to help creators make more money and share their art with a wider audience. Today, Webtoon...

item.title: The versatile Play speaker is a great way into the Sonos world
item.description: It's been nearly a year and a half since Sonos released a consumer product, and those last two releases - the Arc Ultra and Sub 4 - were updates to existing products. The $299 Sonos Play, however,...

item.title: EU backs nude app ban and delays to landmark AI rules
item.description: European lawmakers have voted to delay key parts of the EU AI Act, the bloc's flagship law for regulating artificial intelligence, while also backing proposals to ban nudify apps. The measures,...

item.title: The Download: a battery pivot to AI, and rewriting math
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Why this battery company is pivoting to AI Qichao Hu...

item.title: A ‘pound of flesh’ from data centers: one senator’s answer to AI job losses
item.description: Fears of AI-driven job loss are growing fast, and they’re fueling backlash against data centers. Sen. Mark Warner suggests taxing them to help workers survive the transition.

item.title: Senators Demand to Know How Much Energy Data Centers Use
item.description: In a letter sent Thursday morning, Elizabeth Warren and Josh Hawley press the Energy Information Agency to mandate annual electricity disclosure for data centers.

item.title: DJI’s Avata 360 is a more functional, flexible 360 drone
item.description: DJI's Avata 360 finds the company at an odd time. For one, it's been beaten to the punch - upstart Antigravity's A1 became the first 360-degree drone when it launched last December, and DJI is...

item.title: OpenAI shelves erotic chatbot ‘indefinitely’
item.description: OpenAI ​has paused plans to release a sexualized "adult mode" for ChatGPT, in its latest move to refocus on the company's core ​products. According to The Financial Times, the erotic chatbot has...

item.title: Masters of Imitation: How Hackers and Art Forgers Perfect the Art of Deception
item.description: Unmasking impostors is something the art world has faced for decades, and there are valuable lessons from the works of Elmyr de Hory that can apply to the world of defensive cybersecurity. During...

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: PQC Push, AI Vuln Hunting, Pirated Traps, Phishing Kits & 20 More Stories
item.description: Some weeks in security feel loud. This one feels sneaky. Less big dramatic fireworks, more of that slow creeping sense that too many people are getting way too comfortable abusing things they...

item.title: Mistral releases a new open-source model for speech generation
item.description: Mistral's new speech model can run on a smartwatch or a smartphone.

item.title: Coruna iOS Kit Reuses 2023 Triangulation Exploit Code in New Mass Attacks
item.description: The kernel exploit for two security vulnerabilities used in the recently uncovered Apple iOS exploit kit known as Coruna is an updated version of the same exploit that was used in the Operation...

item.title: As the US Midterms Approach, AI Is Going to Emerge as a Key Issue Concerning Voters
item.description: In December, the Trump administration signed an executive order that neutered states’ ability to regulate AI by ordering his administration to both sue and withhold funds from states that try to...

item.title: ‘She’s Never Going to Age’: Porn Stars Are Embracing AI Clones to Stay Forever Young
item.description: AI companion platforms like OhChat and SinfulX are offering adult creators digital twins, who are always at their peak and stay monetizing.

item.title: The snow gods: How a couple of ski bums built the internet’s best weather app
item.description: The best snow-forecasting app for skiers and snowboarders isn’t from any of the federally funded weather services. Nor from any of the big-name brands. It’s an independent app startup that...
